label: No onboarding or guided first-trade experience for novice investors
Sell toggle accessible with 0 oz holdings — leads to error
Currency selector introduces massive cognitive load
Amount field label ambiguous — spend amount vs quantity unclear
Price chart has no Y-axis labels or gridlines
Metal tabs use expert codes (XAU) over plain names
Trade nav goes directly to Gold — no trade landing page
Account dropdown shows full account numbers — unnecessary noise
Button height 36px — below 44px touch target minimum
